Forbes reports that enterprise AI governance is becoming an operations problem rather than a slide-deck topic as deployments move closer to revenue workflows.

Watch Forbes: Why AI spending is rising again

Executives want to know how a team will detect drift, pause a risky model path, and document what happened after an automated decision fails.

Listen to article

That is pushing teams to treat observability, review queues, and rollback design as core product requirements instead of optional infrastructure work.

More From Forbes
